business_definition: Represents a formal insurance claim submitted against an issued policy.
Represents First Notice of Loss (FNOL) information submitted by the claimant.
Represents the insured event that resulted in the claim.
Represents technical assessment of physical damages.
Represents verification of policy coverage and eligibility.
Represents operational workflow and lifecycle of the claim.
Represents fraud detection and investigation intelligence.

entity_type: explainability and operational intelligence for the claim.
